ats_utilities.option.engine module¶

Module

engine.py

Info

Defines class OptionManager with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an option parser based on the argparse argument processor.

class ats_utilities.option.engine.OptionManager(component_bundle: OptionBundle)[source]¶

Bases: ContextSupport, IOptionManager

Defines class OptionManager with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an option parser based on the argparse argument processor.

It defines:

attributes:
_shared_context - Context bundle with shared context.
_is_initialized - Indicates if the option manager component is initialized (default False).
_strategy - Strategy for argument parsing (default ParserStrategy).
methods:
__init__ - Initials OptionManager constructor.
get_shared_context - Returns the shared context.
add_operation - Adds an option to the parser.
add_version_operation - Adds version option to the parser.
parse_input_args - Processes arguments from the start.
parse_args - Processes arguments from the start.
parse_command - Parses arguments as a command.
register_commands - Registers a list of commands with the parser.
is_initialized - Checks if the option manager component is initialized.
__str__ - Returns the string representation of OptionManager.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_is_initialized: bool¶
_shared_context: ContextBundle¶
_strategy: IParserStrategy¶
add_operation(*args: str, **kwargs: Any) → None[source]¶

Adds an option to the parser.

Parameters:

  • args (<str>) – List of flags for the ATS.

  • kwargs (<Any>) – Arguments in shape of dictionary.

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Missing or empty attribute: ‘_strategy’.
add_version_operation(version: str | None) → None[source]¶

Adds version option to the parser.

Parameters:

version (<str | None>) – The version in string format | None.

Exceptions:
ATSRuntimeError: Decorator cannot be used on a standalone function.
ATSAttributeError: Class is required to provide a ‘_reporter’ object to
use the @vreport decorator.
ATSTypeError: Parameter type validation failed.
ATSValueError: Parameter format validation failed.
ATSRuntimeError: Decorator used on a non-class method.
ATSAttributeError: Class does not provide a ‘_checker’ object.
get_shared_context() → ContextBundle[source]¶

Returns the shared context.

Returns:

Shared context.

Return type:

<ContextBundle>

Exceptions:

None.

is_initialized() → bool[source]¶

Checks if option parser component is initialized.

Returns:

<True> if successful, <False> otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Missing or empty attribute: ‘_strategy’.
parse_args(arguments: OptArgs) → OptionNamespace[source]¶

Processes arguments from the start.

Parameters:

arguments (<OptArgs>) – Sequence of arguments | None.

Returns:

Option namespace object.

Return type:

<OptionNamespace>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Missing or empty attribute: ‘_strategy’.
ATSRuntimeError: Decorator cannot be used on a standalone function.
ATSAttributeError: Class is required to provide a ‘_reporter’ object to
use the @vreport decorator.
parse_command(arguments: OptArgs = None) → tuple[str, Mapping[str, Any]][source]¶

Parses arguments as a command.

Parameters:

arguments (<OptArgs>) – Sequence of arguments | None.

Returns:

Tuple of (command name, command arguments) (read only data).

Return type:

<tuple[str, Mapping[str, Any]]>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Missing or empty attribute: ‘_strategy’.
parse_input_args(arguments: OptArgs) → OptionNamespace[source]¶

Processes arguments from the start.

Parameters:

arguments (<OptArgs>) – Sequence of arguments | None.

Returns:

Option namespace object.

Return type:

<OptionNamespace>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Missing or empty attribute: ‘_strategy’.
ATSRuntimeError: Decorator cannot be used on a standalone function.
ATSAttributeError: Class is required to provide a ‘_reporter’ object to
use the @vreport decorator.
register_commands(commands: Sequence[IOptionCommand]) → None[source]¶

Registers a sequence of commands with the parser.

Parameters:

commands (<Sequence[IOptionCommand]>) – Sequence of commands to register (read only data).

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Missing or empty attribute: ‘_strategy’.
